items.name: Government-Issued Uniforms
items.description: All uniforms are issued at RTC — do not bring civilian uniforms
items.whyNeeded: Navy issues all required uniforms including NWU, PT gear, and dress whites.
items.selectionTips: Wait to be issued. Bringing unauthorized uniforms wastes space.

items.name: Personal Hygiene Kit
items.whyNeeded: Hygiene standards are strictly enforced from day one.
items.selectionTips: Unscented products only. Travel-size. No aerosols. Keep it minimal.

recommendedProducts.name: Army & Navy Recruit Hygiene Bundle
recommendedProducts.reason: Pre-assembled to RTC standards — everything you need in the right sizes to pass inspection without overthinking it.

items.name: Black Athletic Socks
items.whyNeeded: Required for PT uniform. White socks are not authorized.
items.selectionTips: Cotton or moisture-wicking blend. Bring 8+ pairs.

recommendedProducts.name: Darn Tough Tactical Micro Crew
recommendedProducts.reason: Built for Navy deck environments — stays dry, resists odor, and outlasts PX alternatives by months of hard daily use.

items.name: Combination Lock
items.whyNeeded: Required to secure your gear locker.
items.selectionTips: Combination only, no keys. Memorize the combo before you arrive.

items.name: Identification Documents
items.description: Birth certificate, Social Security card, state ID
items.whyNeeded: Required for in-processing and DEERS enrollment.
items.selectionTips: Originals only. Keep in a sealed envelope — they'll be collected.

items.name: Foot Powder
items.selectionTips: Use daily after showers to prevent athlete's foot and odor.

items.name: Boot Insoles
items.selectionTips: Superfeet or Sof Sole reduce fatigue and shin splints from standing on steel decks.

recommendedProducts.name: Superfeet Green Insoles
recommendedProducts.reason: Navy decks are unforgiving steel. Superfeet absorb the continuous impact that leads to stress fractures and chronic shin splints during RTC.

items.name: Stamps and Envelopes
items.selectionTips: Letters are the primary communication. Stock up before leaving.

items.name: Cell Phone
items.notes: Phones allowed only during designated liberty. Cannot be used in barracks.

items.name: Excessive Cash
items.notes: Bring a debit card. Cash will be secured.
